name: GetAlertSummary
description: Fetches alert summary. Use minutes=1 for 'last 1 minute', minutes=5 for 'last 5 minutes'. Use hours=1, 12, 24 otherwise. Returns data in table format.

minutes.description: Time period in minutes (e.g. 1, 5, 30). Use when user asks for last 1 minute, 5 minutes, etc. Overrides hours.

name: GetBankServicesStatus
description: Returns combined bank services status: Health API (/health) + App Runner (RUNNING/PAUSED). One table per service – use when user asks about service status, health, or whether services are running. Display the table_summary exactly as returned.
